title: San Francisco Tour Reviews | SF Attractions Reviews | Testimonials
content: * + alcatraz-ferry-tour-alcatraz-jail Alcatraz. ## San Francisco & Alcatraz - Great Experience. I have always wanted to go to Alcatraz Island with my wife, and we finally got to do it. We booked Yosemite 3-day tour , Silicon Valley and San Francisco tours through them; they exceed our expectations. We took a tour with Golden Horizon as we got cancelled at last-minute by another company due to the lack of Alcatraz tickets, which we prepaid thru the interne, but, when we arrived at Fisherman's Wharf to embark the ferry, they had no reservations for us! We booked the Napa Valley and Alcatraz combo tour thru Golden Horizon tour, almost 2 months in advance, and we are so glad we did. Alcatraz and San Francisco combo tour is highly recommended. ## San Francisco city tour & Alcatraz at night experience. Unfortunately, we were not able to get same day tickets to Alcatraz Island, but our tour guide managed to get us night tickets to Alcatraz prison the next day.

title: Is San Francisco worth visiting? Our honest review
content:
Is San Francisco worth visiting? Our honest review 🇺🇸
Armand & Tiegan
1150 subscribers
10 likes
144 views
15 May 2026
Is San Francisco really as amazing as everyone says… or is it overrated? 🤔 In this video, we explore the real San Francisco — from the iconic Golden Gate Bridge and famous views to the hidden realities most travel videos don’t talk about.

We’re sharing our honest experience visiting San Francisco, including the things we loved, what surprised us, and whether this famous California city is actually worth visiting in 2026.

Whether you're planning a trip, moving to San Francisco, or just curious about what life and travel here are really like, this video gives you the good, the bad, and the unexpected.

If you enjoy travel content, city guides, and real experiences around the world, subscribe and join us on the journey 🌎

title: The Exploratorium and its Tactile Dome - San Francisco
content: Overall, this is such a fun experience! Best if you have a partner. I'm guessing they would pair up single visitors. There is a cost above the regular admission
